summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of 'Daily Orientation Loop' feature completed. All 12 tests PASSED. Feature creates daily return cycle showing yesterday's pattern and today's recommended direction when user opens app on a new day. Clearing localStorage 'philos_daily_orientation' triggers orientation section to appear. Section shows correct Hebrew content: header 'התמצאות יומית', subheader 'היום מתחיל מחזור חדש של החלטות.', yesterday section 'אתמול' with 'לא הייתה פעילות.', today section 'היום' with direction badge (התאוששות) and recommendation. Start Day button (התחל את היום) is clickable, section disappears after clicking, localStorage saves metadata correctly (date, day_started, orientation_direction), and orientation doesn't reappear after page reload. RTL Hebrew layout maintained with dir='rtl'.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: Component uses data-testid attributes (daily-orientation-loop-section, yesterday-pattern, today-recommendation, start-day-btn)
GOOD: RTL layout with dir='rtl' on section element
GOOD: LocalStorage persistence using 'philos_daily_orientation' key with proper metadata structure
GOOD: New day detection via isNewDay() function comparing lastActivity timestamp with current date
GOOD: Yesterday pattern analysis (analyzeYesterdayPattern) processes history for previous day decisions
GOOD: Recommended actions based on yesterday's pattern (harm → recovery, avoidance → order, etc.)
GOOD: Direction colors properly applied (green for contribution, blue for recovery, indigo for order)
GOOD: Clean visual design with amber gradient background and proper spacing
seed_data_creation: None required - localStorage manipulation simulates new day
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Orientation Loop feature is fully functional. To trigger orientation: localStorage.removeItem('philos_daily_orientation'); then reload page. Section appears at top of Home tab. After clicking 'התחל את היום', section disappears and localStorage stores: {date, timestamp, day_started, orientation_direction, orientation_pattern_reference, yesterday_count}. Key data-testids: daily-orientation-loop-section, yesterday-pattern, today-recommendation, start-day-btn.

feature_tests.test: DailyOrientationLoopSection appears when localStorage philos_daily_orientation is cleared
Section shows subheader 'היום מתחיל מחזור חדש של החלטות.'
Yesterday shows 'לא הייתה פעילות.' when no previous activity
Today shows recommended action with 'מומלץ' prefix
Start Day button (התחל את היום) exists and is clickable
After clicking Start Day, orientation section disappears
Orientation doesn't reappear on page reload (saved to localStorage)
RTL Hebrew layout maintained with dir='rtl'

daily_orientation_loop.subheader: היום מתחיל מחזור חדש של החלטות.

start_day_button.action: Saves to localStorage and hides section
